message:
fix: assorted correctness fixes across grpc, kafka, networking, and runtime

grpc/health.rs: swap if/else arms in HealthWatcher::changed() so the
early-return false path is the equality case, aligning with the
project convention of putting the short/no-op branch first.

messaging/kafka.rs: add missing .await on four producer.send() /
send_with_headers() calls in tests. The producer's send method is async;
without await the tests were asserting on a Future rather than the
Result, which compiled only because the error path was never exercised.

net/happy_eyeballs.rs: add break after recording the first successful
connection in RaceConnections::poll. Without this, the loop continued
polling remaining futures after a winner was found, which could
overwrite winner with a later completion.

runtime/reactor/token.rs: fix token_pack_unpack_max_values test to use
platform-appropriate maximum index values. On 32-bit targets the slab
token index field is 24 bits; using u32::MAX - 1 caused silent
truncation. Now uses SlabToken::MAX_GENERATION for the generation field.

runtime/region_table.rs: ensure RegionRecord.id is always set to the
arena-assigned RegionId in both insert and insert_with, preventing
id/index mismatches during lookup.

tests/e2e_log_quality_schema.rs: add two new verify-matrix lifecycle
tests for redaction_mode contract validation.

tests/grpc_production_features.rs: remove unused Status import and add
allow annotation for imports reserved for upcoming T5.7 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
